question: Will Bitcoin exceed $100k by December 31, 2026?
description: This market resolves YES if the price of Bitcoin (BTC/USD) on CoinGecko exceeds $100,000.00 at any point before December 31, 2026 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, it resolves NO.

question: Will the Fed cut rates in March 2026?
description: This market resolves YES if the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) announces a reduction in the federal funds target rate at the conclusion of its March 2026 meeting (March 17-18, 2026). A hold or increase resolves NO.

question: Will Ethereum reach $5,000 by June 2026?
description: This market resolves YES if the price of Ethereum (ETH/USD) on CoinGecko reaches or exceeds $5,000.00 at any point before June 30, 2026 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, it resolves NO.

question: Will there be a US government shutdown before April 2026?
description: This market resolves YES if a partial or full US federal government shutdown occurs at any point before April 1, 2026 12:00 AM ET. A shutdown is defined as a lapse in appropriations resulting in furloughs of federal employees. Otherwise, it resolves NO.

question: Will the S&P 500 close above 6,000 on March 31, 2026?
description: This market resolves YES if the S&P 500 index (SPX) closing price on March 31, 2026 is strictly above 6,000.00. If the market is closed on that date, the last available closing price before that date will be used. Otherwise, it resolves NO.

question: Will Apple release a foldable iPhone in 2026?
description: This market resolves YES if Apple Inc. officially announces and releases a foldable iPhone model for consumer purchase at any point during calendar year 2026. An announcement without availability for purchase does not count. Otherwise, it resolves NO.

question: Will SpaceX complete a Starship orbital flight by July 2026?
description: This market resolves YES if SpaceX successfully completes a full orbital flight of the Starship vehicle (including both Super Heavy booster and Starship upper stage reaching orbit) before July 31, 2026 11:59 PM ET. A suborbital test flight does not qualify. Otherwise, it resolves NO.

question: Will US GDP growth exceed 3% in Q1 2026?
description: This market resolves YES if the Bureau of Economic Analysis (BEA) advance estimate of US real GDP growth for Q1 2026 (January-March) is strictly above 3.0% annualized. The advance estimate is typically released approximately 4 weeks after the quarter ends. Otherwise, it resolves NO.
